overview.description: The First Trust Dorsey Wright DALI Equity ETF (DALI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Dorsey Wright DALI Equity index. The fund tracks an index that uses momentum indicators to rotate between US and international equity sleeves. The fund exclusively holds the single strongest-performing sleeve and uses other First Trust ETFs for exposure. DALI was launched on May 14, 2018 and is issued by First Trust.
